title: AST DUI & MIW4: Fairbanks [AK25099001]
summary: On September 28, 2025, Alaska State Troopers responded to a report of gunfire and a disturbance at a residence on Oh Boy Lane in Fairbanks. Troopers contacted Michael Wilson, who was found to be impaired and in possession of two unsecured firearms inside his vehicle. Wilson was arrested and charged with Driving Under the Influence and two counts of Misconduct Involving Weapons in the Fourth Degree.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST DUI - Alcohol and Leaving the scene of a collision: Wasilla [AK25098798]
incident_type: DUI - Alcohol and Leaving the scene of a collision
summary: On 09/28/2025 Alaska State Troopers contacted Mark Siefert, age 72, of Wasilla, at a residence of Knik Goose Bay Road following a hit-and-run collision. Investigation revealed Siefert was intoxicated by alcohol and had left the scene of an earlier property-damage collision. Siefert was arrested for DUI and leaving the scene of a crash. He was remanded to Mat-Su Pretrial.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
topic: DUI - Alcohol and Leaving the scene of a collision

charges: leaving the scene of a crash
entities.address_detail: a residence of Knik Goose Bay Road following a hit-and-run collision
